contents.title: Strategic R&D Alignment: Q2-Q3 2026 Integrations
contents.content:
# Strategic R&D Alignment: Q2-Q3 2026 Integrations

**Date**: June 01, 2026
**Lead Author**: @christinevandev (Christine Vandevoorde)
**Contributors**: @jessicazartler (Jessica Zartler), @furf8 (Dan Furfari), @nick-phl-7 (Nick Hirannet)
**Domain**: Operations / Engineering Management

## Portfolio Review
As we structure the R&D portfolio for the coming quarters, the priority is completing the KOI integration across all scientific computing and qualitative research streams.

## Operational Execution
**Dan Furfari (Furf)** and **Nick Hirannet** have successfully scoped the resource allocations needed. We are clearing overhead from the main engineering tracks to let Sayer, Danilo, and Rohan focus exclusively on the core KOI bridging mechanics.

## Communications & Ecosystem
**Jessica Zartler** will be leading the dissemination strategy. She will be framing the LLM-augmented workflow and ethnographic integrations in our upcoming external communications, potentially tying it into her continuous work with the Token Engineering Academy.

All technical progress must be tracked in the designated Drive docs and GitHub repos.

## Senior Leadership Alignment

**Michael Zargham** (@mzargham) has reviewed the KOI integration roadmap and confirmed alignment with DynamicalSystemsGroup's systems engineering frameworks. Zargham emphasized that the multi-scale modeling approach must maintain consistency across all R&D streams.

**Danilo Lessa Bernardineli** (@danlessa) is leading the technical integration of the KOI protocol with our cadCAD simulation infrastructure. Danilo's physics-informed modeling expertise ensures that the knowledge graph topology reflects real-world causal structures.

**Integration Milestones**:
1. Multi-scale modeling validation (Danilo)
2. LLM retrieval pipeline optimization (Rohan)
3. Knowledge graph quality assurance (Steve)
4. Cross-project dependency mapping (Nick)

* **Slack Reference**: [Slack #operations](https://dynamicalsystemsgroup.slack.com/archives/COPS2026X/p1717201889)
* **Leadership Approval**: [Chief Engineer Sign-off](#)
